_note: Real post-deterministic-edges recall for sk-hynix-hmcg84agbra191n-ddr5-32gb (134 listings, 2026-06-28 live Serper+eBay+Amazon). Committed so Phase-41+ filter tuning can re-measure WITHOUT re-scraping (CLAUDE.md). Verdicts intentionally omitted (model-dependent).
